M

MAIN_ARTICLE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"mainArticle": The name for the Main Article reference.
mdFilter - Variable in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
 
mdxmlFilter - Variable in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
 
mediawiki - Variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLMediawikiLink
The mediawiki reference.
MEDIUM - Static variable in interface org.docgene.api.FontSize
"medium".
MEDIUM - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.FontNamedSizeType
The medium size.
member - Variable in class org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI
The API member.
MessageBoxType - Interface in org.docgene.model
The XMLMessageBox types.
METHOD - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLIncludedAPIMember
Method members.
MIDDLE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.VerticalAlignment
The middle alignment.
MISC_CHAPTER - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"miscellanous": The title for the miscellanous topics chapter.
modifiers - Variable in class org.docgene.model.AbstractXMLAPIDoc
The modifiers.
MONTHS - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"months": The name for the months.
MP4 - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLVideo
The MP4 video type.
